_comment: DeepSpeed pipeline-parallel config for gpt2-xl on 2x T4. train_micro_batch_size_per_gpu and gradient_accumulation_steps are overridden from the CLI (src/train_deepspeed.py builds the effective config at runtime); this file documents the canonical settings. fp16 dynamic loss scaling + DeepSpeed-managed fp32 master weights make convergence robust on Turing (no bf16).
